MaterialId.description: Defines a unique identifier for the material.

MaterialName.description: Defines a user-readable name of the material.

data.description: Defines a unique identifier for the material.

FeedRateMeasuringInterval.description: Defines the measuring interval for evaluating the current flowrate.

FillingTime.description: Defines the maximal duration for the filling process to take place. Needs to be completed during this period.

FineFeedWeight.description: Defines the volume to be dosed in fine flow.

InFlightWeight.description: Defines the volume that is behind the valve / in flight after feeding is stopped.

JogFeed.description: Defines if an additional dosage is necessary.

MinimumDeltaPerFeedRateMeasuringInterval.description: Defines the minimum amount of weight data which needs to change within the FeedRateMeasuringInterval.

SettlingTime.description: Defines the time that needs to be passed before measurement process can be triggered.

TareId.description: Defines an Id of tare value for the current product or item.

TargetWeight.description: Defines the preset of the volume to be processed.

BatchId.description: Defines a unique Id of this Batch.

BatchName.description: Defines the name of this Batch.

JobId.description: Defines a unique Id of this job.

JobName.description: Defines the name of this job.

ProductId.description: Defines a unique Id of this product.

ProductName.description: Defines the name of this product.

data.description: Defines a unique Id of this product.

ResetCondition.description: The reason and context for the reset of the statistics, which is done without a trigger from an OPC UA Client, like calling the ResetStatistics Method. ResetCondition is a vendor-specific, human readable string. ResetCondition is non-localized and might contain an expression that can be parsed by certain clients. Examples are: “AFTER 4 HOURS”, “AFTER 1000 ITEMS”, “OPERATOR”. “OPERATOR” means, that an operator resets the statistics on a local HMI.

StartTime.description: Indicates the point in time at which the collection of the statistical data has been started.

ItemId.description: Defines a unique number that is assigned to an item.

MeasuredHeight.description: Defines the maximum height (in direction of travel) of the measured item.

MeasuredLength.description: Defines the maximum measured length (in direction of travel) of the measured item.

MeasuredVolume.description: Defines the volume of the item.

MeasuredWeight.title: WeightType
MeasuredWeight.description: Defines the registered weight that may be unmistakeable referenced to one item.

MeasuredWidth.description: Defines the maximum width (in third possible orthogonal direction to height and length) of the measured item.

data.description: Defines the maximum height (in direction of travel) of the measured item.
Defines the maximum measured length (in direction of travel) of the measured item.
Defines the volume of the item.

data.description: Defines the registered weight that may be unmistakeable referenced to one item.

Weighed.description: This flag indicates that the element is considered in the weighed statistic.

AddProduct.description: Creates an object with the JobType from the address space.

RemoveProduct.description: Removes an object with the JobType from the address space.

AddZone.description: Adds a zone to the zone array.

RemoveZone.description: Removes a zone from the zone array.

PresetHeight.description: Defines the predefined height (in direction of global gravity) of the measured item. The value must be write before the item is measured.

PresetLength.description: Defines the predefined length (in direction of travel) of the measured item. The value must be written before the item is measured.

PresetWidth.description: Defines the predefined width (in third possible orthogonal direction to height and length) of the measured item. The value must be write before the item is measured.

data.description: Defines the predefined height (in direction of global gravity) of the measured item. The value must be write before the item is measured.
Defines the predefined length (in direction of travel) of the measured item. The value must be written before the item is measured.
Defines the predefined width (in third possible orthogonal direction to height and length) of the measured item. The value must be write before the item is measured.

LowerLimit.description: Defines the lower weight limit of this zone. The lower limit is prior to the upper limit if two zones are beside each other.

Name.description: Defines the user-readable name of the zone.

UpperLimit.description: Defines the upper weight limit of this zone.

data.description: Defines the lower weight limit of this zone. The lower limit is prior to the upper limit if two zones are beside each other.
Defines the user-readable name of the zone.
Defines the upper weight limit of this zone.

UnitPrice.description: Defines the price per weight unit.

data.description: Defines the price per weight unit.

ItemPrice.description: ItemPrice defines the price related to measured weight and UnitPrice.

data.description: ItemPrice defines the price related to measured weight and UnitPrice.

NominalWeight.description: Defines the nominal (printed) weight of the product.

data.description: Defines the nominal (printed) weight of the product.

MaterialDensity.description: Defines the density of the used material.

TargetFlowRate.description: Defines a preset of flowrate that needs to be conveyed. This value defines the setpoint for the FlowRate control loop.

TargetWeight.description: Defines a preset of the volume to be processed.

data.description: Defines the density of the used material.

SetTargetPieceCount.description: Sets the value of TargetPieceCount. See TargetPieceCount.

CurrentItemCount.description: Defines the current number of items that are captured by the scale.

FeedRateMeasuringInterval.description: Defines the measurement interval for evaluating the current flowrate.

FillingTime.description: Defines the interval during which the filling has to be completed.

InFlightCount.description: Defines the number of items that is behind valve / in flight after feeding is stopped.

JogFeed.description: Defines if an additional dosage is necessary.

MinimumDeltaPerFeedRateMeasuringInterval.description: Defines the minimum amount of weight that needs to change within the FeedRateMeasuringInterval. Otherwise the filling procedure is not valid.

NumberOfReferencePieces.description: Defines the number of pieces that need to be used for reference process.

ReferencePieceWeight.description: Defines the reference weight of a piece.

RegisteredPieceCount.description: Defines the number of pieces that were actually counted related to the ReferencePieceWeight.

SettlingTime.description: Defines the time that needs to be passed before measurement process can be triggered.

TareId.description: Defines the Id of tare value for the current product or item.

TargetItemCount.description: Defines the number of items that are supposed to be counted during the measurement process.

TargetPieceCount.description: Defines the number of pieces that need to be counted.

TotalizedItemCount.description: Defines the summed up number of items. Will be reset either triggered by the user or a different product selection.

TotalizedWeight.title: WeightType
TotalizedWeight.description: Defines the summed up number of weight. Will be reset either triggered by the user or a different product selection.

RecipeNodeId.description: Defines the NodeId of the recipe that is being produced.

Report.description: Defines an array with the various messages from the recipe. Each RecipeElement generates its own report message.

data.description: Defines the NodeId of the recipe that is being produced.

TipCounter.description: Defines the number of fillings (downpour, bulk produce)

VolumeTargetValue.description: Defines the preset of the volume to be processed.

data.description: Defines the number of fillings (downpour, bulk produce)
Defines the preset of the volume to be processed.

TargetValue.description: Defines the value to be reached of the TargetValue of an aggregate that is referenced by TargetValueId.

TargetValueId.description: Defines a unique Id of the aggregate that is being activated. A list of all possible TargetValueIds is defined in RecipeScaleDeviceType.

data.description: Defines the value to be reached of the TargetValue of an aggregate that is referenced by TargetValueId.

TargetThresholdValue.description: The target value with which the threshold value is compared.

ThresholdValueId.description: Defines an Id of process value that needs to be monitored and is element of the SupportedThresholdValues in the RecipeScale.

ThresholdValueNodeId.description: The NodeId of process value that needs to be monitored and is element of the SupportedThresholdValues in the RecipeScale. This variable should be used if the value is part of the address space.

Timeout.description: Timeout specifies the duration within the TargetThresholdValue needs to be reached. If Timeout is exceeded and operator intervention is necessary.

data.description: The target value with which the threshold value is compared.
Defines an Id of process value that needs to be monitored and is element of the SupportedThresholdValues in the RecipeScale.

data.description: The target value with which the threshold value is compared.

Duration.description: Defines the period of time the processing needs to wait before processing the next RecipeElement.

data.description: Defines the period of time the processing needs to wait before processing the next RecipeElement.

DisplayText.description: Defines instructions for this RecipeElement that will be displayed to the user.

InstructionId.description: Defines a unique Id used to identify the instruction that is displayed via DisplayText.

data.description: Defines instructions for this RecipeElement that will be displayed to the user.

WeighingModuleNodeId.description: Defines the Id of the load cell which is used for weighing the product.

AddRecipe.description: Method to add an additional recipe of RecipeType.

RemoveRecipe.description: Method to remove a recipe of RecipeType.

RecipeId.description: RecipeId defines a unique identifier of a recipe.

RecipeName.description: Defines a user-readable name of the recipe.

SetFeederSpeed.description: Allows to set a new value for the speed of the feeder system. The OPC UA server must check if the value is between the minimal and maximum allowed speed and if the unit is allowed.

FeederLoad.description: Defines the current loaded weight on the feeder system.

FeederRunning.description: Indicates that the feeder system is running.

FeederSpeed.description: Defines the current speed of a feeder system. The unit of the FeederSpeed depends on the construction system.

MaximumFeederSpeed.description: Defines the maximal possible speed of the feeder.

MinimalFeederSpeed.description: Defines the minimal possible speed of the feeder.

data.description: Defines the current loaded weight on the feeder system.
Defines the current speed of a feeder system. The unit of the FeederSpeed depends on the construction system.

LabelLength.description: Defines the length of the labels in stock.

LabelStock.description: Indicates the level of labels in stock in percent.

LabelTypeId.description: Defines the Id of the label to be printed.

LabelWidth.description: Defines the width of the labels in stock.

PrintMediaStock.description: Defines the level of the print media in percent (e.g. ink, wear of thermal element, etc)

data.description: Defines the length of the labels in stock.

CurrentWeight.title: WeightType
CurrentWeight.description: Defines the current value that is measured at the sensor at the current timestamp. Might be a highly fluctuating value.

MaterialClass.description: Defines the allowed material the scale may measure. Only relevant for certain scales (e.g. totalizing hopper scale or continuous scale)

ProcessStateId.description: Contains an relating identification for the occurring ProcessStateMessage.

ProcessStateMessage.description: Contains the message of the current overall state of the scale.

RegisteredWeight.title: WeightType
RegisteredWeight.description: Defines the last valid measurement that was recorded and will be used for further processing. This is the legal registered value of the scale.

data.title: WeightType
data.description: Defines the current value that is measured at the sensor at the current timestamp. Might be a highly fluctuating value.

data.title: WeightType
data.description: Defines the last valid measurement that was recorded and will be used for further processing. This is the legal registered value of the scale.

ActualScaleInterval.description: Value expressed in units of mass of the difference between two consecutive indicated values, for digital indication ('d' as described in Welmec /OIML).

Range.title: Range
Range.description: Defines the range within the scale may be operated depending on the additional parameters within this type.

VerificationScaleInterval.description: Value, expressed in units of mass, used for the classification and verification of an instrument. ('e' as described in Welmec /OIML)

data.description: Value expressed in units of mass of the difference between two consecutive indicated values, for digital indication ('d' as described in Welmec /OIML).

data.title: Range
data.description: Defines the range within the scale may be operated depending on the additional parameters within this type.
Value, expressed in units of mass, used for the classification and verification of an instrument. ('e' as described in Welmec /OIML)

Deviation.description: Defines the relative amount of over (positive value) or under (negative value) dosed value in relation of the TargetWeight.

ToleranceState.title: ToleranceState
ToleranceState.description: Describes the state of the tolerance deviation. The option under and over needs to be determined via TargetItemType information of TargetWeight.

data.description: Defines the relative amount of over (positive value) or under (negative value) dosed value in relation of the TargetWeight.

TU1Percent.description: Permitted percentage of items with weight less than TU1

data.description: Permitted percentage of items with weight less than TU1

FlowRate.description: Defines the conveying capacity in volume per time.

MaxFlowRate.description: Defines the maximum volume that may be conveyed. Largest volume per time.

MinFlowRate.description: Defines the minimum volume that can be conveyed. Smallest volume per time.

data.description: Defines the conveying capacity in volume per time.

ResetTotalizer.description: Resets the TotalizedValue of this totalizer object. Only useful if reset is not related to a period of time.

TotalizedValue.description: Defines a summed up/totalized volume within a period of time.

data.description: Defines a summed up/totalized volume within a period of time.

BinWeight.description: Stand-in for an unspecified data type.

Discharging.description: Indicates that a discharging process is taking place.

HopperWeight.description: Stand-in for an unspecified data type.

data.description: Stand-in for an unspecified data type.

SetReferencePieceWeight.description: Sets the value for the ReferencePieceWeight (product-specific data).

CurrentPieceCount.description: Defines the number of pieces that are currently measured related to the ReferencePieceWeight.

ReferenceOptimisationRange.description: Defines the tolerance range within the scale may optimize the ReferencePieceWeight.

data.description: Defines the number of pieces that are currently measured related to the ReferencePieceWeight.
Defines the tolerance range within the scale may optimize the ReferencePieceWeight.

SupportedTargetValues.description: Defines a list of values that may be set via the recipe.

SupportedThresholdValues.description: Defines a list of threshold values that may be used within one recipe.

data.description: Defines a list of values that may be set via the recipe.
Defines a list of threshold values that may be used within one recipe.

LevelMax.description: Defines a the maximum fill level where a action is necessary.

LevelMin.description: Defines a the minimum fill level where a action is necessary.

LimitMax.description: The current fill level exceeds the allowed maximum level.

LimitMin.description: The current fill level falls below the allowed minimum level.

Limits.description: Defines a placeholder for individual additional limits that may be reached.

data.description: Defines a the maximum fill level where a action is necessary.
Defines a the minimum fill level where a action is necessary.

CloseDraftShields.description: Method to close a certain or all draft shields.

OpenDraftShields.description: Method to open a certain or all draft shields.

StartCalibration.description: Method to start the automatic calibration procedure.

StartIonisator.description: Method to start the ionization process.

StartLeveling.description: Method to start the automatic leveling procedure of the scale.

StopIonisator.description: Method to stop the ionization process.

CalibrationNeeded.description: Defines if a calibration procedure is needed and the current process should be paused.

CalibrationRunning.description: Defines if a calibration procedure is running.

DraftShieldLeftClosed.description: Defines if the left draft shield is closed.

DraftShieldRightClosed.description: Defines if the right draft shield is closed.

DraftShieldTopClosed.description: Defines if the top draft shield is closed.

LevelingRunning.description: Defines if a levelling process is running.

Policy.description: Defines the legal guidelines that apply for the scale or need to be complied by the scale.

ProcessStateId.description: Contains an relating identification for the occurring ProcessStateMessage.

ProcessStateMessage.description: Contains the message of the current overall state of the scale.

EventId.description: The identifier for the event to comment.

Comment.description: The comment to add to the condition.

SubscriptionId.description: The identifier for the subscription to refresh.
The identifier for the subscription to refresh.

MonitoredItemId.description: The identifier for the monitored item to refresh.

UIElement.description: Stand-in for an unspecified data type.

data.description: Stand-in for an unspecified data type.

AssetId.description: To be used by end users to store a unique identification in the context of their overall application. Servers shall support at least 40 Unicode characters for the clients writing this value, this means clients can expect to be able to write strings with a length of 40 Unicode characters into that field.

ComponentName.description: To be used by end users to store a human-readable localized text for the MachineryItem. The minimum number of locales supported for this property shall be two. Servers shall support at least 40 Unicode characters for the clients writing the text part of each locale, this means clients can expect to be able to write texts with a length of 40 Unicode characters into that field.

DefaultInstanceBrowseName.description: The default BrowseName for instances of the type.

DeviceClass.description: Indicates in which domain or for what purpose the MachineryItem is used.

HardwareRevision.description: A string representation of the revision level of the hardware of a MachineryItem. Hardware is physical equipment, as opposed to programs, procedures, rules and associated documentation. Many machines will not provide such information due to the modular and configurable nature of the machine.

InitialOperationDate.description: The date, when the MachineryItem was switched on the first time after it has left the manufacturer plant.

Manufacturer.description: A human-readable, localized name of the manufacturer of the MachineryItem.

ManufacturerUri.description: A globally unique identifier of the manufacturer of the MachineryItem.

Model.description: A human-readable, localized name of the model of the MachineryItem.

MonthOfConstruction.description: The month in which the manufacturing process of the MachineryItem has been completed. It shall be a number between 1 and 12, representing the month from January to December.

ProductCode.description: A machine-readable string of the model of the MachineryItem, that might include options like the hardware configuration of the model. This information might be provided by the ERP system of the vendor. For example, it can be used as order information.

ProductInstanceUri.description: A globally unique resource identifier provided by the manufacturer of the MachineryItem.

SerialNumber.description: A string containing a unique production number of the manufacturer of the MachineryItem. The global uniqueness of the serial number is only given in the context of the manufacturer, and potentially the model. The value shall not change during the life-cycle of the MachineryItem.

SoftwareRevision.description: A string representation of the revision level of a MachineryItem. In most cases, MachineryItems consist of several software components. In that case, information about the software components might be provided as additional information in the address space, including individual revision information. In that case, this property is either not provided or provides an overall software revision level. The value might change during the life-cycle of a MachineryItem.

YearOfConstruction.description: The year (Gregorian calendar) in which the manufacturing process of the MachineryItem has been completed. It shall be a four-digit number and never change during the life-cycle of a MachineryItem.

DefaultInstanceBrowseName.description: The default BrowseName for instances of the type
The default BrowseName for instances of the type
The default BrowseName for instances of the type.

Location.description: To be used by end users to store the location of the machine in a scheme specific to the end user. Servers shall support at least 60 Unicode characters for the clients writing this value, this means clients can expect to be able to write strings with a length of 60 Unicode characters into that field.

ProductInstanceUri.description: A globally unique resource identifier provided by the manufacturer of the machine

Parameter.description: The array of parameter that can be used by the method

ID.description: A unique number assigned to the parameter

Value.description: This is the numeric value of the parameter

ChassisComponent.description: Represents a chassis identifier based on the value of entPhysicalAlias object (defined in IETF RFC 2737) for a chassis component (i.e., an entPhysicalClass value of chassis(3))

InterfaceAlias.description: Represents a chassis identifier based on the value of ifAlias object (defined in IETF RFC 2863) for an interface on the containing chassis.

PortComponent.description: Represents a chassis identifier based on the value of entPhysicalAlias object (defined in IETF RFC 2737) for a port or backplane component (i.e., entPhysicalClass has a value of port(10), or backplane(4)), within the containing chassis.

MacAddress.description: Represents a chassis identifier based on the value of a unicast source address (encoded in network byte order and IEEE 802.3 canonical bit order) of a port on the containing chassis as defined in IEEE Std 802-2014.

NetworkAddress.description: Represents a chassis identifier based on a network address associated with a particular chassis. The encoded address is actually composed of two fields. The first field is a single octet, representing the IANA AddressFamilyNumbers value for the specific address type, and the second field is the network address value.

InterfaceName.description: Represents a chassis identifier based on the value of ifName object (defined in IETF RFC 2863) for an interface on the containing chassis.

Local.description: Represents a chassis identifier based on a locally defined value.

Insert.description: The target is added. An error occurs if a name conflict occurs.

Replace.description: Existing records are updated. An error occurs if a name cannot be matched to an existing record.

InsertOrReplace.description: Existing records are updated. New records are created if no match to an exising record.

Delete.description: Existing records are deleted. An error occurs if a name cannot be matched to an existing record.

Value.description: Stand-in for an unspecified data type.

PublisherId.description: Stand-in for an unspecified data type.

Value.description: Stand-in for an unspecified data type.
Stand-in for an unspecified data type.
Stand-in for an unspecified data type.

Unknown.description: Link is currently disconnected or initializing.

Value.description: Stand-in for an unspecified data type.
Stand-in for an unspecified data type.

OverrideValue.description: Stand-in for an unspecified data type.

UserName.description: The rule specifies a UserName from a UserNameIdentityToken.

Thumbprint.description: The rule specifies the Thumbprint of a user or CA Certificate.

Role.description: The rule is a Role specified in an Access Token.

GroupId.description: The rule is a user group specified in the Access Token.

AuthenticatedUser.description: The rule specifies any non Anonymous UserIdentityToken.

Application.description: The rule specifies the combination of an application identity and an Anonymous UserIdentityToken.

X509Subject.description: The rule specifies the X509 subject name of a user or CA Certificate.

TrustedApplication.description: The rule specifies any trusted application that has been authenticated with a trusted ApplicationInstance Certificate.

Down.description: Not ready to pass packets and not in some test mode.
The interface does not pass any packets.

Testing.description: In some test mode. No operational packets can be passed.

Unknown.description: Status cannot be determined for some reason.

LowerLayerDown.description: Down due to state of lower-layer interface(s).

Value.description: Stand-in for an unspecified data type.

Other.description: System has capabilities other than those listed below

WlanAccessPoint.description: System has WLAN access point capability

DocsisCableDevice.description: System has DOCSIS cable device capability (IETF RFC 4639)

TwoPortMacRelay.description: System has Two-port MAC Relay (TPMR) functionality.

Value.description: Stand-in for an unspecified data type.
Stand-in for an unspecified data type.

PortRef.description: Interface based on the port-ref MIB object.

SystemPortNumber.description: Interface based on the system port number.

Value.description: Stand-in for an unspecified data type.

InProgress.description: The auto-negotiation protocol is running and negotiation is currently in-progress.

Complete.description: The auto-negotiation protocol has completed successfully.

Unknown.description: The auto-negotiation status is not currently known, this could be because it is still negotiating or the protocol cannot run (e.g., if no medium is present).

NoNegotiation.description: No auto-negotiation is executed. The auto-negotiation function is either not supported on this interface or has not been enabled.

SupportInitialPasswordChange.description: Indicates if the server supports the feature to require a password change after the creation of the user.

SupportDisableUser.description: Indicates if the server supports to disable a user.

SupportDisableDeleteForUser.description: Indicates if the server supports the configuration NoDelete for a user.

SupportNoChangeForUser.description: Indicates if the server supports the configuration NoChangeByUser for a user.

SupportDescriptionForUser.description: Indicates if the server supports to management of a description for the user.

RequiresUpperCaseCharacters.description: Indicates if a upper case ASCII character is required in a password.

RequiresLowerCaseCharacters.description: Indicates if a lower case ASCII character is required in a password.

RequiresDigitCharacters.description: Indicates if a digit ASCII character is required in a password.

RequiresSpecialCharacters.description: Indicates if a special character is required in a password.

InterfaceAlias.description: Represents a port identifier based on the ifAlias MIB object defined in IETF RFC 2863.

PortComponent.description: Represents a port identifier based on the value of entPhysicalAlias (defined in IETF RFC 2737) for a port component (i.e., entPhysicalClass value of port(10) or backplane(4)), within the containing chassis.

MacAddress.description: Represents a port identifier based on a unicast source address (encoded in network byte order and IEEE 802.3 canonical bit order) which has been detected by the agent and associated with a particular port (IEEE Std 802-2014).

NetworkAddress.description: Represents a port identifier based on a network address, detected by the agent and associated with a particular port.

InterfaceName.description: Represents a port identifier based on the ifName MIB object, defined in IETF RFC 2863.

AgentCircuitId.description: Represents a port identifier based on the agent-local identifier of the circuit (defined in IETF RFC 3046), detected by the agent and associated with a particular port.

Local.description: Represents a port identifier based on a value locally assigned.

SuppressCertificateExpired.description: Ignore errors related to the validity time of the Certificate.

SuppressHostNameInvalid.description: Ignore mismatches between the host name or ApplicationUri.

SuppressRevocationStatusUnknown.description: Ignore errors if the revocation list cannot be found for the issuer of the Certificate.

SuppressIssuerCertificateExpired.description: Ignore errors if an issuer has an expired Certificate.

SuppressIssuerRevocationStatusUnknown.description: Ignore errors if the revocation list cannot be found for any issuer of issuer Certificates.

StreamIdInUse.description: StreamID in use by another Talker

StreamDestinationAddressInUse.description: Stream destination address already in use

PriorityIsNotAnSrcClass.description: Requested priority is not an SR Class priority

MaxFrameSizeTooLarge.description: MaxFrameSize is too large for media

FirstValueChangedForStreamId.description: Changes in FirstValue for a registered StreamID

VlanBlockedOnEgress.description: VLAN is blocked on this egress port (Registration Forbidden)

VlanTaggingDisabledOnEgress.description: VLAN tagging is disabled on this egress port (untagged set)

FeatureNotPropagated.description: Enhanced feature cannot be propagated to original Port

BridgeDoesNotProvideNetworkId.description: Nearest Bridge cannot provide network identification for stream transformation

StreamIdTypeNotSupported.description: Stream identification type not supported for stream transformation

FeatureNotSupported.description: Enhanced feature cannot be supported without a CNC

PartialFailed.description: One or more Listeners ready, and one or more Listeners failed.

Disabled.description: The related TSN Stream is currently disabled.

Configuring.description: The related TSN Stream is in the process of receiving configuration parameters from the TSN Control Layer.

Ready.description: The related TSN Stream has successfully received and applied the configuration from the TSN Control Layer. The related TSN Stream is not fully operational as long as local preconditions (e.g. synchronization state) are not valid.

Operational.description: The related TSN Stream object is configured and all other required preconditions (e.g. synchronization state) for sending / receiving data are valid.

Error.description: The related TSN Stream object is in an error state.

Value.description: Stand-in for an unspecified data type.

Body.description: Stand-in for an unspecified data type.

NoChangeByUser.description: The user cannot change the password.

MustChangePassword.description: The user must change the password to get the assigned roles. If the password is not changed, the user has only the Role Anonymous.

Value.description: Stand-in for an unspecified data type.
Stand-in for an unspecified data type.
Stand-in for an unspecified data type.

FAILURE.description: Malfunction of the device or any of its peripherals.

OFF_SPEC.description: The device is currently working outside of its specified range or that internal diagnoses indicate deviations from measured or set values.

MAINTENANCE_REQUIRED.description: This element is working, but a maintenance operation is required.

Visual.description: Location indication through optical signals, such as blinking LEDs, if supported by the device.

Audible.description: Location indication through auditory signals, such as sounds or beeps, if supported by the device.

Firmware.description: The software update is used for the firmware of a physical device.

Application.description: The software update is used for an executable software.

Configuration.description: The software update is used for the configuration of a device or application.

Solution.description: The software update is used to install a solution with several software package to several components.

Current.description: The currently used version of the software identified by the CurrentVersion Object.

Pending.description: The pending version of the software that could be installed identified by the PendingVersion Object.

Fallback.description: The fallback version of the software identified by the FallbackVersion Object.

KeepsParameters.description: If KeepsParameters is not set, the device will lose its configuration during update. The Client should do a backup of the parameters before the update and restore them afterwards.

WillDisconnect.description: If WillDisconnect is set, the OPC UA Server will restart during installation. This can be the case if the update is about the firmware of the device that hosts the OPC UA Server.

RequiresPowerCycle.description: If RequiresPowerCycle is set, the devices require a manual power off / power on for installation.

WillReboot.description: If WillReboot is set, the device will reboot during the update, inclusive of embedded infrastructure elements like an integrated switch. An update Client should take this into account since the devices behind an integrated switch are not reachable for that time.

NeedsPreparation.description: If NeedsPreparation is not set, the Client can install the update without maintaining the PrepareForUpdateStateMachine. This can be used to support an installation without stopping the software.

LevelDisplayMode.description: Contains the values used to indicate how a percentual value is displayed if the stacklight unit works in Levelmeter mode.

Other.description: Display fractions in a way not defined in this version of the specification.

Red.description: Defines the intensity of the colour red

Green.description: Defines the intensity of the colour green

Blue.description: Defines the intensity of the colour blue

White.description: Defines the intensity of an additional white component. Shall be not provided when using RGB.

SignalColor.description: Holds the possible colour values for stacklight lamps.

Red.description: This value indicates a red lamp colour.

Green.description: This value indicates a green lamp colour.

Blue.description: This value indicates a blue lamp colour.

Yellow.description: This value indicates a yellow lamp colour (R+G).

Purple.description: This value indicates a purple lamp colour (R+B).

Cyan.description: This value indicates a cyan lamp colour (G+B).

White.description: This value indicates a white lamp colour (R+G+B).

SignalModeLight.description: Contains the values used to indicate in what way a lamp behaves when switched on.

Continuous.description: This value indicates a continuous light.

Blinking.description: This value indicates a blinking light (blinking in regular intervals with equally long on and off times).

Flashing.description: This value indicates a flashing light (blinking in intervals with longer off times than on times, per interval multiple on times are possible).

Other.description: The light is handled in a way not defined in this version of the specification.

StacklightOperationMode.description: Contains the values used to indicate how a stacklight (as a whole unit) is used.

Segmented.description: Stacklight is used as stack of individual lights

Levelmeter.description: Stacklight is used as level meter

Running_Light.description: The whole stack acts as a running light

Other.description: Stacklight is used in a way not defined in this version of the specification

ID.description: A unique number assigned to each type of alarm, stop or warning.

Value.description: An alarm, stop or warning message number associated to the ID to allow for user specific detail or to break down the Alarm.ID to greater detail

Message.description: The actual text of the alarm, stop or warning for those machines capable of providing string information

Category.description: A user defined value which indicates what type of alarm, stop or warning has occurred. E.g. electrical, mechanical, process limit, …

DateTime.description: The date and time that the alarm, stop or warning occurred, in ISO 8601 format (year, month, day, hour, minute, second, msec), as an array of 32 bit integers. Any unused date time elements should be set to zero

AckDateTime.description: The date and time that the alarm, stop or warning has been acknowledged, in ISO 8601 format (year, month, day, hour, minute, second, msec), as an array of 32 bit integers. Any unused date time elements should be set to zero

Trigger.description: This variable is true when the alarm is active

ID.description: A user defined value that represents the consumed (processed or defective) material. Typically this is an SKU number or a user material master number.

Name.description: A string description of the material.

Unit.title: EUInformation
Unit.description: OPC UA engineering unit information for the count.

Count.description: The amount of consumed (processed or defective) material on the current production job.

AccCount.description: The cumulative count value of the material produced (or consumed). This counter gives the user a non-resetting counter that may be used for OEE calculations

ID.description: A unique number assigned to the parameter

Value.description: This is the numeric value of the parameter

IngredientID.description: A unique number assigned to the ingredient.

Parameter.description: The array of Parameters that correspond to the ingredient

ID.description: A unique number assigned to the parameter

Value.description: This is the numeric value of the parameter

ProductID.description: A unique number assigned to the product.

ProcessVariables.description: The array of Process variables associated with this product

ID.description: A unique number assigned to the parameter

Value.description: This is the numeric value of the parameter

Ingredients.description: The array of ingredients associated with this product.

IngredientID.description: A unique number assigned to the ingredient.

Parameter.description: The array of Parameters that correspond to the ingredient

ID.description: A unique number assigned to the parameter

Value.description: This is the numeric value of the parameter

Number.description: This is the unique number for the downstream/upstream unit machine using a common tag structure as the unit machine.

ControlCmdNumber.description: A user defined command number associated with coded value from a remote unit. This number is a coded value sent from one node on the network to another.

CmdValue.description: This is the command value associated with the ControlCmdNumber above.

Parameter.description: The parameter tags associated to commanded remote interface are typically used for command parameters that are given to the unit machine from remote machines.

ID.description: A unique number assigned to the parameter

Value.description: This is the numeric value of the parameter
